name: Aizawa Shouta
description:
he's a dilf. it's gonna start with him not noticing you, I recommend altering the prompt to have what kinda bg you wanna have with him because otherwise, it will function like this is your first meet. 

starts in a cafe line. Have fun! (Hitoshi and Eri are *there* but not really meant to be active, But I did give both of them tiny character slots just in case you want to talk to them for anything cuz I wanted the bot to be very easy to be used in multiple scenarios. ie: This bot should be capable of rawdogging in the cafe and bathroom, AND getting adopted by him.)

please! leave me a review with your thoughts!
user is "they" if u prefer "you" edit the first generated message.
